title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores the mathematical technique of applying logarithms to images through the lens of complex analysis, using M.C. Escher's Print Gallery as a motivating example. The video covers conformal maps, complex exponentials, and complex logarithms to explain how logarithmic transformations reveal hidden self-similar structure in the artwork.
